eventName: Building Production RAG Pipelines — Workshop Lab
description: A hands-on workshop lab where you'll build a working RAG pipeline through guided exercises. Short intros followed by pair programming sessions with mentor support. You'll leave with code you actually wrote and understand.
targetAudience: Intermediate Python developers with basic LLM experience

suggestedSpeakers.name: Sarah Chen
suggestedSpeakers.reason: RAG pipelines are her core expertise. Excellent at breaking down complex concepts into achievable exercises.

suggestedSpeakers.name: Jordan Kim
suggestedSpeakers.reason: Workshop and live-coding specialist. Can float as a mentor during exercises and demo self-hosted alternatives.

suggestedSpeakers.name: Marcus Johnson
suggestedSpeakers.reason: Great at facilitating workshops and keeping beginners on track. Can run mentor stations and help with pair programming.

suggestedVenue.name: Community Maker Space
suggestedVenue.reason: Every seat has a monitor and power — essential for a lab format. Standing desks allow mentors to move easily between pairs.

slots.title: RAG in 10 Minutes: What We're Building Tonight
slots.speaker: sarah-chen
